race.comment: YAMASHITA (14) didn't fire a shot on debut back in November but looks to have come on nicely during the break, stripping fitter for a Kembla Grange trial win. Can make a statement fresh. SUNSET ROYALE (10) has her first start for the new stable and should find this a fair bit easier. Boudvillain's booking alone demands respect. SWEET FARNAN (11) finds the maiden win elusive but boasts peaks that can measure right up for this. Has her first start for the new stable and drops back in trip off 35-days. Expected to make her presence felt. PIERATA STAR (4) steps out on debut on her home track. Only given the one soft trial but suspect her to be more handy race day.
